items.common_effect: When attacking with any Element, increases the damage taken by the target affected by the activated Burst.
items.unique_effect: Creates a barrier upon activation, and the barrier is strengthened when attacking enemies affected by the Burst.

items.common_effect: When attacking with any Element, increases the damage taken by the target affected by the activated Burst.
items.unique_effect: After the Burst occurs, taking damage causes additional damage to the target and nearby enemies.

items.common_effect: When attacking with any Element, increases the damage taken by the target affected by the activated Burst.
items.unique_effect: When the Burst occurs, a wind field forms around the target, pulling in nearby monsters.

items.common_effect: When attacking with any Element, increases the damage taken by the target affected by the activated Burst.
items.unique_effect: After the Burst occurs, taking damage triggers an explosion on the target, dealing additional damage.

items.common_effect: When attacking with any Element, increases the damage taken by the target affected by the activated Burst.
items.unique_effect: When the Burst occurs, applies a Cold stack to the target. Attacks with the Cold Element add stacks, and upon reaching the maximum stack, the target becomes Frozen.
When the Burst occurs, converts any active Normal Elemental Burst into a Darkness Elemental Burst and extends its duration.
Does not trigger a Burst, but increases the Burst Gauge of the most recently accumulated Element.
